subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be sacrificed for Thee! The most luminous and pure letter dated the 25th of Sha'bán arrived at the most auspicious hour... and concerning what was asked about the Book of Certitude which was addressed to the honored Uncle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی فداک دستخط انور اطهر که مورخهٴ ٢٥ شعبان بود در اسعد اوان وارد ... و اینکه سؤال شده بود که در کتاب ایقان که باسم جناب خال
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
